core_mechanism: a bulk-boundary (dimensional-lift) duality that maps the observables of a lower-dimensional strongly-coupled system onto the geometric flow of a higher-dimensional dynamical system along an added radial 'scale' coordinate, so that distinct asymptotic/interior regimes of that flow are read off from boundary two-point correlators
brief_reason: The whole construction is a holographic model in which a strongly coupled boundary field theory is dual to a higher-dimensional interior geometry whose deep-flow regime (Little Rip vs Kasner) is distinguished through boundary heavy-operator correlators.
